---
title: "Lawrence Wu"
image: images/lawrence.jpg
comments: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lawrencewu1+blog@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lawrencewu920/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/lawwu
      target: _blank
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/law_wu
      target: _blank
---

::: {#hero-heading}

```{=html}
<p class="hero-role">Principal Data Scientist &amp; AI Harness Engineer</p>
<div class="hero-stats-row">
  <div class="hero-stat-item">
    <span class="hero-stat-num">10+</span>
    <span class="hero-stat-label">years ML</span>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stat-divider"></div>
  <div class="hero-stat-item">
    <span class="hero-stat-num">60+</span>
    <span class="hero-stat-label">posts</span>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stat-divider"></div>
  <div class="hero-stat-item">
    <span class="hero-stat-num">UKG</span>
    <span class="hero-stat-label">current</span>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="hero-tags-row">
  <span class="hero-tag hero-tag-accent">Claude Code</span>
  <span class="hero-tag hero-tag-accent">AI Agents</span>
  <span class="hero-tag">LLMs</span>
  <span class="hero-tag">Machine Learning</span>
  <span class="hero-tag">Python</span>
</div>
```

I am a Data Scientist & AI Harness Engineer developing Foundation Models and Agentic ML at UKG. I have 10+ years of experiencing building machine learning systems. In recent years I have developed expertise in LLMs, Agentic Harnesses and adapting to new ways of working with coding agents like Claude Code and Codex. I'm a lifelong learner and enjoy sharing what I've learned with others through writing. I believe writing is thinking.

## Subscribe {#subscribe}

You can subscribe to my blog via [email newsletter](https://lawrencewu.substack.com/) or using the [RSS feed](https://lawwu.github.io/blog.xml).

I try to send out a weekly newsletter with things I've written on this blog as well as other things I've been reading:

```{=html}
<div class="newsletter-callout">
  <div class="newsletter-callout-icon">✉</div>
  <div class="newsletter-callout-body">
    <div class="newsletter-callout-title">Weekly newsletter</div>
    <p class="newsletter-callout-desc">Things I've written, papers I've read, and tools worth knowing about — delivered weekly.</p>
    <div class="newsletter-callout-actions">
      <a href="https://lawrencewu.substack.com/subscribe" target="_blank" class="newsletter-btn-primary">Subscribe on Substack →</a>
      <a href="https://lawrencewu.net/index.xml" class="newsletter-btn-secondary">RSS feed</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Let's Connect

I'm open to consulting opportunities and collaborations. Check out [Doxa Solutions](https://doxasolutions.ai){target="_blank"} or reach out via any of the links above.

:::
